subcodes.first_line: He Who hath been wronged testifieth that the Most Exalted Pen hath made mention of thee both at morn and at eventide, when it thundered forth in its course [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: م ه شهد المظلوم ان القلم الاعلی ذکرک فیکل صباح و مساء مره استن فی مضمار
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat]
